page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BUSI788 or BUSO788.

BUSO798 Special Topics in Business (1-4 Credits)

Selected advanced topics in the various fields of graduate study in business.

Prerequisite: Permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
